name: hotel-ecs-workspace
description: Hotel ECS Check-in System Root Workspace

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix pbx-connector
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env PBX_MODE=tcp PBX_HOST=127.0.0.1 PBX_PORT=10001 npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "PBX,API,WEB" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgCyan.bold" "npm run dev:simulator" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
